mapper.select: SELECT r.id, r.site_id, r.workflow_id, r.relation_type, r.is_visible, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, s.name as site_name, w.workflow_name as workflow_name, w.workflow_code as workflow_code FROM gb_site_workflow_relation r LEFT JOIN gb_sites s ON r.site_id = s.id LEFT JOIN gb_workflow w ON r.workflow_id = w.id WHERE r.site_id = #{siteId} ORDER BY r.id

SELECT r.id, r.site_id, r.workflow_id, r.relation_type, r.is_visible, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, s.name as site_name, w.workflow_name as workflow_name, w.workflow_code as workflow_code FROM gb_site_workflow_relation r LEFT JOIN gb_sites s ON r.site_id = s.id LEFT JOIN gb_workflow w ON r.workflow_id = w.id WHERE r.workflow_id = #{workflowId} ORDER BY r.id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gb_site_workflow_relation ( site_id, workflow_id, relation_type, is_visible, create_by, create_time ) VALUES ( #{siteId}, #{workflowId}, #{relationType}, #{isVisible}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )

INSERT INTO gb_site_workflow_relation ( site_id, workflow_id, relation_type, is_visible, create_by, create_time ) VALUES
( #{item.siteId}, #{item.workflowId}, #{item.relationType}, #{item.isVisible}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE relation_type = VALUES(relation_type), is_visible = VALUES(is_visible), update_time = NOW()
